transcript.narrator_intro: Listen to a conversation between a woman and a man.

dialogue.speaker: F1
dialogue.text: Did you return the library book before it was due?

dialogue.speaker: M1
dialogue.text: Yes. I returned it yesterday, so I didn't have to pay a late fee.

transcript.question_intro: Why did the man return the book yesterday?

questions.prompt: Why did the man return the book yesterday?

choices.text: To avoid paying a late fee.
Because he finished reading it today.

questions.explanation: He returned the book before the due date to avoid a late fee.
questions.evidence: I didn't have to pay a late fee.
